name: XML-co ban
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: format goi cong cu da doi. Tu nay, moi goi cong cu phai dung XML, khong ho tro JSON nua.
Vi du dung：
<tool_call><function><name>get_weather</name><arguments>{"city": "Hanoi"}</arguments></function></tool_call>
Vi du sai：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]
Hay dung format XML, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(hay output tool call bang format XML)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
